name: capell-app/navigation
description: Site- and language-scoped navigation menus for Capell: visual menu builder, page & link items, nested dropdowns, active-state rendering, publish scheduling, and multi-site replication.

healthChecks.label: Navigation package surfaces, providers, and install health are discoverable by Diagnostics.

marketplace.summary: Build and manage multilingual, per-site menus visually — link to any page or URL, nest dropdowns, and render them in your theme with one tag. Active-state, publish windows, and site cloning included.
